Dear << Test First Name >>

On Saturday, March 14th, Beauregard Vineyards is inviting Parker's Picks to shuck fresh oysters on an exceptionally beautiful Saturday in Bonny Doon.

We will be pairing the oysters with the new release 2024 Chardonnay "Metallique" Bald Mountain Vineyard. The 2024 vintage gave us what we are calling a "Goldilocks" growing season with flawless, even ripening that allowed us to capture Bald Mountain's fruit at its absolute peak of freshness.

Fermented entirely in cold stainless steel, the Metallique is Chardonnay stripped down to its live-wire core. Expect a high-voltage surge of Meyer lemon zest, crisp green apple, and crushed seashells, all riding a bracing, bone-dry finish that feels like a brisk morning walk through the coastal fog.

See you there!

Ryan

  • Instagram

Beauregard Vineyards · 10 Pine Flat Rd · Santa Cruz, CA 95060 · USA
